thesis: AFTER-HOURS window authored on the deterministic snapshot asOf 2026-07-24T20:48:31.967Z (~16:48 ET Friday 7/24), marketClosed=false, positioning snapshot.nextSessionDate = 2026-07-24 (the session the deterministic feed still flags as pending; the 7/24 regular session just traded and the feed has not rolled to a settled-close/next-day state). WHAT CHANGED vs the 7/24 pre-market run: the tape firmed at the index level but the tech-led damage DEEPENED underneath. SPY ticked from 738.18 to 738.93 and its 50-day gap improved slightly (-0.7% vs -0.79%) — but it is STILL below its 50-day (~744.1), not reclaimed, so the core hold stays DOWNGRADED and index beta stays on hold. STRUCTURE FIRST: the extended structural bull is intact on the longer MAs (SPY +6.26% over its 200-day ~695.4, mom126/252 +7.82%/+17.8%, -2.47% off the ATH ~757.6) and SPY carries a deterministic bull MA-stack again, but the theme's rejection is unrepaired and leadership stays DEFENSIVE/ENERGY/RATE-SENSITIVE. TECH-LED SELLING EXTENDED, NOT HEALED: QQQ fell to 684.23 and widened its 50-day gap to -4.69% (from -3.67%, TANGLED, mom5 -1.6); VGT 113.3 tangled -2.76% below its 50-day; XLK LAGGING deteriorated further (rsMom 99.03<100, accel -0.42). THE RELATIVE HOLD IS NOW BEING TESTED: SPMO fell to 146.51 and slipped to -2.68% below its 50-day (from -0.45%), yet it STILL holds its bull MA-stack (20>50>200, +14.47% over its 200-day, mom5 +1.82 still positive) — broad momentum is bending but not broken, which keeps this a rotation read rather than a liquidation, though with less margin than yesterday. SEMIS ROLLED FURTHER BACK: SOXX is now LAGGING (rsMom 98.91<100, rsMom1m -13.16, above-50 only 1/12, up-momentum 2/12), still +32.69% over its 200-day but with no reclaimed leadership. Persistence by distinct COMPLETED daily bars: ~11 (7/09->7/23) — 7 directly confirmed (7/09->7/17) plus 7/20/7/21/7/22 via the recentHistory date-roll chain and 7/23 SETTLED; the 7/24 session is IN PROGRESS (marketClosed=false, no settled 7/24 bar flagged) and is NOT counted; intraday reruns are not counted. ROTATION (owning tool REFRESHED this run, sector-research-lab asOf 2026-07-24T20:48:31Z, 11 sectors): reads 'Rotate toward XLRE as XLV weakens'. Leadership is DEFENSIVE/ENERGY/RATE-SENSITIVE: XLRE board-best on acceleration (rsMom 102.22, accel +2.89, into), XLE highest rsMom (102.74, rsRatio 101.21, accel +2.27, into, +15.46% over its 200-day), XLU (rsMom 101.78, accel +1.91), XLB (rsMom 101.71, accel +2.38), XLI (rsMom 101.04, accel +2.16), XLP (rsMom 101.45, accel +1.9) all Leading/Improving into, XLF Leading neutral (rsMom 100.42, accel -0.04) — versus XLK LAGGING (rsMom 99.03<100, accel -0.42), XLC/XLY Lagging, XLV Weakening/out (rsMom 99.98<100, accel -0.11). MAGS Lagging (1/7 bull-stacked, ma200Dist -2.5). GLOBAL/REAL-ASSETS (owning tools CARRIED from earlier today 13:30Z, ~7h stale, NOT refreshed this run): global-rotation-lab Asia/global-led on a local-currency (FX-headwind) basis — EWS Singapore 79.6 leads vs ACWI, EWU UK 65.4 and EWC Canada 64.3 next; real-assets-lab shows NO precious-metal haven bid (GLD 16.5, SLV 0, BTC-USD 38 mixed) but a clear ENERGY/COMMODITY lead (PDBC 66.6, DBC 66.5, DBA 63.7) confirming the energy tilt; etf-momentum-lab has SPMO leading the 6M balanced ranking (24.77%, 13 scored). TACTICAL, last: monthly OPEX (7/17) is RESOLVED and dealer gamma has RESET — prior pin/wall/magnet values are DEAD; fresh post-OPEX gamma walls, the pin/magnet, option-implied moves, VIX9D/VIX3M term structure and the live 7/29 FedWatch path (carried ~53.5% hold / ~46.5% hike, STALE/UNVERIFIED) are NOT in this run and MUST be re-pulled before sizing any gamma trade, vol-term claim, or Fed positioning. Overnight/after-hours single-name and cash-tape prints are NOT surfaced separately in Tier-A this run. PLAN into the next session: HOLD the longer-term structure but do NOT add index beta while the SPY 50-day (~744.1) is still overhead (require a confirmed daily CLOSE reclaim, not an intraday tag); TRIM stretched tech/semis beta into strength (QQQ/VGT below their 50-days and widening; SOXX Lagging with 1/12 above its 50-day); ROTATE toward the confirmed defensive/energy/rate-sensitive Leading 'into' cluster (XLRE board-best on accel and XLE commodity-confirmed, plus XLU/XLB/XLI/XLP) funded from weakening XLV/lagging XLK; HOLD (don't chase) MSFT below its 50-day into the 7/29 capex guide; carry the small defined-risk hedge into the weekend toward the live two-way 7/29 Fed — keep it small/cheap with VIX at 18.58 and re-verify the live path first. Catalysts: NO high-importance macro release scheduled for 7/24 in Tier-A and none over the weekend; the nearest cluster is 7/29 FOMC 2:00pm ET + MSFT FY26-Q4 AMC.
